{{CargoRelic
|name=Nestor's Cup
|class_id=22028
|rank=Blue
|affct=ART
|birthday=09-18
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.07%), Wishing (0.03%)
|description=On Sept 18, 1955 AD, this cup was found in a ancient Greek mausoleum.<br>Nestor's Cup is a goblet made of gold. There are two pigeons on the handles. On the cup is the text about Iliad & Odyssey that reads, "I am Nestor's cup, good to drink from. Whoever drinks this cup empty, straightaway desire for beautiful-crowned Aphrodite will seize him."
|fame=22
|art=44
|fth=31
|civ=31
|tech=26
|ss1=Per 10 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +1
|ss2=Per 10 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +2
|ss3=Per 10 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +3
|ss4=Per 10 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +5
|ss7=Per 10 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +5<br>Per 10 Mutant Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill I.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Snail ART +200
}}
